return(function(...)local function k(k)return i[k+(-190093+232046)]end for k,S in ipairs({{884320-884319,-230543-(-231087)};{285119+-285118,-250585-(-250872)};{179677+-179389,126658+-126114}})do while end end return(function(i,F,b,J,v,o,W,O,t,x,p,S,T,N,z,I,r,K,q,c,R,j,C,H)S,C,K,c,j,t,p,H,q,O,I,N,z,r,R,T,x=function(S,b,J,v)local
